calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Cornelia Hucks in propria persona

The Court asked if Ms. Hucks went to City Hall for the marriage license. Ms. Hucks stated she didn't know where it was pulled, that she has a lot on her plate right now and she is still in mourning. The Court stated for this route to work it is necessary for a license to be issued, that petitioner has another route to file a petition for "validity of marriage" in family court and asked if Ms. Hucks has sought any legal assistance or tried asking the ACCESS center at the court. Ms. Hucks stated she can give the court a list of attorneys she has tried to contact but no one returns her calls or tells her they can't help her. The Court stated she can contact the state bar to search for a family law attorney. Ms. Hucks stated she is still searching for the license, that she doesn't where it is, that she was living in Contra Costa County at the time and he was living in Solano County at the time. The Petition to establish fact of marriage is taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

***order establishing fact of marriage signed after hearing***

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2020 Continued To Apr-15-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Cornelia Hucks in Propria Persona.

Mrs. Hucks explained circumstances and efforts made. The Court explained to Mrs. Hucks that there are two routes she could go (this petition or through Family Law to do validity of marriage), stated that it needs proof that they got a marriage license, explained the difference between a marriage license and a marriage certificate, and suggested that she go to City Hall to see if anyone ever pulled a marriage license. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is continued to April 15, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Singh. Not reported.
